indicators.name: dining tables
indicators.rationale: Dining tables are not suitable for cooking activities due to their height and lack of a built-in surface for food preparation.

indicators.name: bar stools
indicators.rationale: Bar stools are not suitable for cooking activities due to their height and lack of a built-in surface for food preparation.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is not suitable for cooking activities due to its potential to absorb moisture and become slippery when wet.

indicators.name: brick wall
indicators.rationale: Brick wall is not suitable for cooking activities due to its lack of functionality and potential to create a cold environment.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for daily cooking activities. While there are dining tables and bar stools, they are not suitable for cooking due to their height and lack of a built-in surface for food preparation. The hardwood flooring and brick wall contribute to a less than ideal environment for cooking activities.
